title: Crunchy Light German Dasima-Kombu Pilaf
description: A crunchy and light dish featuring dasima-kombu, inspired by German cuisine, and suitable for shojin-friendly diets.

ingredients.name: dasima-kombu
ingredients.notes: preferably Japanese dasima-kombu or kombu, dried

instructions: Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium heat, add onion and cook until softened.
Add garlic and cook for another minute.
Add 2 sheets of dasima-kombu, cook for 10 seconds, until fragrant.
Add rice, lemon juice and water to the saucepan, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 18 minutes, or until the water has been absorbed.
Remove dasima-kombu sheets, chop into small pieces and stir into the rice mixture.
Add tandoor papadum crumbs, salt and black pepper, stir well.
Transfer to a serving plate, garnish with parsley.
